title: Dreamon Take Apart Dinosaur Toys for Kids with Storage Box Electric Drill DIY Construction Build Set Educational STEM for Boys Girls 3 Years and Up
features: [What You'll Get in that Kids Toys] Dreamon dinosaur toys including Tyrannosaurus Rex, Centrosaurus, Triceratops, Velociraptor, screwdriver, electric drill and storage box. Take your children on a journey of dinosaur discovery.

[Build & Take Apart Dinosaur Toys] With this construction toy, kids can build dinosaurs and take them apart. Even more interesting is that the head, mouth, paws and tails of dinosaurs can be moved. Keep your children focused and have hours of fun.

[We Care About Safety] Our dinosaurs are made of high quality plastic and have passed safety tests. Electric drill toy will automatically stop when encountering obstacles, thus effectively avoiding possible harm to children.

[Educational Set] The dinosaurs can be freely assembled, which will improve hand-eye coordination, manipulative ability, train logical thinking and problem solving-ability. And you won't worry about your kids getting addicted to electronic products.

[Birthday & Christmas Gifts That Kids Will Love] This is a toy that dinosaur lovers can't resist. Ideal gifts for boys girls on birthday, Easter, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, etc. Suitable for kids who 3 years old up. Note: To reduce the difficulty of assembly, please assemble each dinosaur separately according to the accessories individually packaged by the merchant. Do not mix all the accessories together to avoid assembly errors.Please feel free to contact us with any questions.

Next page 1 Tyrannosaurus Rex 2 Triceratops 3 Velociraptor 4 Centrosaurus With Storage Box The package includes 4 dinosaurs, an electric drill and two screwdrivers, all of them in a storage box; Helps children to develop a good habit of storage and also prevents accessories from being lost; Your children can take it out and play with his friends by the portable on storage box. Unlike other cheap plastic dinosaurs, we offer high quality and children can play with them without worry; Every child is an explorer, this dinosaur toy allows your little ones to discover the fun of dinosaur world; Assemble with your children, encourage the children to think and they will fully enjoy the parent-child time; Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
